sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n115722" key="yilh/pleura" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ψιλήπλευρα</orth>, <abbr TEIform="abbr">=</abbr> <sense id="n115722.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">ofellas iuscellatas, Gloss.;</tr_> cf. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ψιλόπλευρον.</foreign> </sense> </entryFree>
